name: explainability-report-mcp
description: AI Explainability and Transparency Reports for AI agents. Capabilities: transparency scan, model card generation, decision explanations, Article 13 audit, impact assessments. Built by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: quick_scan
tools.description: Describe an AI system, get instant transparency assessment. No API key required.

tools.name: generate_model_card
tools.description: Generate an EU AI Act compliant model card.

tools.name: explain_decision
tools.description: Generate human-readable explanation of an AI decision.

tools.name: transparency_audit
tools.description: Assess against EU AI Act Article 13 transparency requirements.

tools.name: create_impact_assessment
tools.description: Generate DPIA/AIIA template for an AI system.
